case_title: JEFFREY E. MARGULIES VS. BRENDAN QUINLAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-06-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED" AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO APR-06-2011 AT 1:30 PM DEPT.#506. PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MARGULIES, JEFFREY E. AS TO DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-05-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-06-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-27-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY A TOTAL OF $7,500 IN 3 INSTALLMENTS BEGINNING TODAY OF $2,500, $2,500 IN JUNE AND $2,500 IN JULY ON THE 15TH DAY OF JUNE AND JULY. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506)
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
